titleStmt.title: SII 34.49: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 49. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman [mistake for Rājakēsarivarman] Kulōttuṅga II, 5th year = A.D. 1138.

Incomplete. It seems to record a gift by an individual of Moykuḍi in Ēmappērūr-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of Tiruvaigāvuḍaiyār in Iṉṉambar-nāḍu, in Vikramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu on the north bank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmEvu vaḷara tiruponmātu puṇara nāmEvu kalai makaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vicaiyaṉ maṉa
makaḷ velpuyattiruppa Icaiyiṉ celviyeṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca naṇṇilamaṭantaiyait tirumaṇa
maṇam puṇantu cīrvaḷa tirumaṇimuṭi kavitteṉa Aṇi muṭicūṭi mallaiñālattu palluyiṟ kellā mellaiyil
liṉpam miyalviṉil leyta veṇkuṭainiḻali ceṅkōllōcci vāḻiyūḻi yāḻi naṭappa cempoṉ vīraciṅkāsaṉattu pu
vaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōppara kēcari paṟmarāna tri puvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrī kolōttuṅkacōḻatēvaṟku
yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu vaṭakarai vikkiramacōḻavaḷanāṭṭu Iṉṉampa nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaikkāvuṭaiyāṟku rājarājavaḷa
nāṭṭu Ēmappēṟūr nāṭṭu moykuṭi moykuṭaiyāṉ tiru
Digital edition of SII 34.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
